sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n104369" key="to/reusis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τόρ-ευσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> <sense id="n104369.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">caelatura, Gloss.;</tr_> cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τόρνευσις.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
